Source   Edit  

Imports

caseutils

Types

FieldJsonOptions = object
  readNames*: seq[NamePattern] ## names that are accepted for this field when encountered in json
                               ## if none are given, this defaults to the original field name and a snake case version of it
  ignoreRead*, ignoreDump*: bool ## whether or not to ignore a field when encountered in json or when dumping to json
  dumpName*: NamePattern     ## name to dump this field in json by
                             ## if not given, this defaults to the original field name
json serialization/deserialization options for an object field Source   Edit   
JsonParseError = object of CatchableError
error that signifies a violation of json grammar, currently not used in all such cases Source   Edit   
JsonValueError = object of ValueError
Source   Edit   
NamePattern = object
  case kind*: NamePatternKind
  of NoName:
    nil
  of NameOriginal:
    nil
  of NameString:
    str*: string
  of NameSnakeCase:
    nil
  of NameConcat:
    concat*: seq[NamePattern]
string pattern to apply to a given field name to use in json Source   Edit   
NamePatternKind = enum
  NoName, NameOriginal,     ## uses the field name
  NameString,               ## uses custom string and ignores field name
  NameSnakeCase,            ## converts field name to snake case
  NameConcat
Source   Edit   
RawJson = distinct string
Source   Edit  

Consts

jsonyFieldCompatibility {.booldefine.} = false
uses the jsony field name patterns by default, which is: to read the original name and a snake case version of the name, and to output the original name of the field. false by default, when disabled only the snake case version of the name is used for both reading and output. Source   Edit   
jsonyHookCompatibility {.booldefine.} = true
allows compatibility with renameHook and skipHook which have been replaced with pragmas, these may become compile time hooks instead. since all other hooks are simply renamed or had their signature changed, this flag does not affect other hooks Source   Edit  

Procs

proc apply(pattern: NamePattern; name: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
applies a name pattern to a given name Source   Edit   
proc getDumpName(fieldName: string; options: FieldJsonOptions): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
gives the name to dump this field in json by if not given, this defaults to the original field name Source   Edit   
proc getReadNames(fieldName: string; options: FieldJsonOptions): seq[string] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
gives the names accepted for this field when encountered in json if none are given, this defaults to the original field name and a snake case version of it Source   Edit   
proc ignore(): FieldJsonOptions {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
creates a field option object that ignores this field in both serialization and deserialization Source   Edit   
proc snakeCase(): NamePattern {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
creates a name pattern that just converts a field name to snake case Source   Edit   
proc toFieldOptions(enabled: bool): FieldJsonOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
hook called on the argument to the json pragma to convert it to a full field option object, for a bool this sets whether or not to enable serialization and deserialization for this field Source   Edit   
proc toFieldOptions(name: NamePattern): FieldJsonOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
hook called on the argument to the json pragma to convert it to a full field option object, for a name pattern this sets both the serialization and deserialization name of the field to it Source   Edit   
proc toFieldOptions(name: string): FieldJsonOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
hook called on the argument to the json pragma to convert it to a full field option object, for a string this sets both the serialization and deserialization name of the field to it Source   Edit   
proc toFieldOptions(options: FieldJsonOptions): FieldJsonOptions {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
hook called on the argument to the json pragma to convert it to a full field option object Source   Edit   
proc toName(str: string): NamePattern {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
creates a name pattern that uses a specific string instead of the field name Source   Edit  

Templates

template json(enabled: bool) {.pragma.}
whether or not to enable this field for both json serialization and deserialization, can be fine tuned by giving a custom options object Source   Edit   
template json(name: string) {.pragma.}
sets a single name between json serialization/deserialization for a field, can be fine tuned by giving a custom options object Source   Edit   
template json(options: FieldJsonOptions) {.pragma.}
sets the json serialization/deserialization options for a field Source   Edit
